strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple product companies (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, WatchUp)
Proven full-stack capability integrating databases, backends, and frontends in production platforms
Demonstrated ability to build data integrations and APIs at scale (Optilyz, Dunnhumby)
concerns: Massive overqualification—Staff/Senior engineer for entry-level Junior/Mid role creates significant retention and morale risk
Technology depth misalignment—background shows breadth across D, Java, C++, Swift, PHP rather than focused depth in PostgreSQL, React, Nest.js, and AWS
Current role trajectory toward AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks diverges from the practical, product-focused platform building this role emphasizes
response.justification: Bogdan is a Staff-level engineer with 13+ years of experience applying for an entry-level position designed for candidates with first to several years of practice. His background demonstrates breadth across many programming languages and domains rather than focused depth in the specified stack (PostgreSQL, Nest.js, React, AWS). Most critically, his current role emphasizes AI infrastructure and agent development, diverging sharply from the practical platform-building and customer-facing portal work required. The overqualification creates high abandonment risk—he would likely outgrow or become frustrated with the role's scope and constraints within months.
